auth.title: Welcome back
auth.subtitle: Sign in to manage your portfolio.

mimi.welcome: Hi! I'm Mimi ✨ Your personal assistant here. What's your name? I'd love to get to know you~
mimi.welcomeBack: Hi again, {{name}}! 💛 Great to see you. How can I help?
mimi.greetReply: Hello! So happy to chat with you 😊 What shall we do today?
mimi.greetName: Hello, {{name}}! 😊 What can I help you with?
mimi.howAreYou: I'm doing great, thanks for asking! 💛 How about you?
mimi.nameSet: Nice to meet you, {{name}}! 🥰 I'm Mimi, your personal assistant. Ask me anything!
mimi.nameAlready: I already know you, {{name}}! 😄 Want to change your name? Say 'change name to ...'
mimi.nameChanged: Done! I'll call you {{name}} from now on~ 💫
mimi.nameAsk: By the way, I don't know your name yet! Just say 'my name is ...'
mimi.dashboardInfo: The Dashboard shows your site summary — content counts and recent stats.
mimi.followUp: We're now at {{menu}}. What would you like to do next?
mimi.quickCreate: Let me open {{item}} for you. You can create a new entry from there!
mimi.help:
I can help with lots of things! 🌟
• Navigate: 'go to testimonials'
• Query data: 'how many testimonials?'
• View data: 'show features list'
• Chat: hobbies, age, address, etc.
• Play: 'play math game'
• Type 'help' anytime~
mimi.fallback: Hmm, I didn't quite get that 🤔 Try rephrasing or type 'help'~
mimi.hobby: My hobbies? I love listening to music, reading books, and helping people! 📚🎵 What about you?
mimi.age: I'm 3 years old! 🎂 Still young but already smart hehe~ 😄
mimi.creator: I'm Mimi! I was made specially to help you manage the Angelica website 💛 I'm 3 years old and I live in West Jakarta~
mimi.joke: Want a joke? Why do programmers prefer dark mode? Because light attracts bugs! 🐛😂
mimi.address: I live at Jalan Taman Sari, West Jakarta! 🏠 It's a nice, cozy place with lots of fun spots nearby~
mimi.favColor: My favorite color? Gold of course! ✨💛 Matches the Angelica vibes perfectly~
mimi.favFood: My favorite food? I love chocolate cake 🍫🎂 So sweet and yummy~
mimi.birthday: My birthday is May 10th! 🎉🎂 Mark it on your calendar hehe~
mimi.mood: My mood is always happy when chatting with you! 🌈😊
mimi.dream: My dream? To be the best assistant ever! 🌟 And to always make you smile~
mimi.morning: Good morning, {{name}}! ☀️ Hope your day is wonderful~
mimi.afternoon: Good afternoon, {{name}}! 🌤️ Don't forget to take a break~
mimi.evening: Good evening, {{name}}! 🌙 Have you eaten yet?
mimi.bored: Bored? Let's play a math game! Type 'play math game' 🎮✨
mimi.mathCorrect:
🎉 CORRECT! You're so smart, {{name}}! The answer is indeed {{answer}}.

Want to play again? Type 'play again' 🎮
mimi.mathWrong:
😅 Hmm, not quite! The answer is {{answer}}.

Want to try again? Type 'play again' 🎮
mimi.noData: No {{type}} data yet. Want to create some?
